title: Review round 1: sieve-form post-fix
notes: Confidence: 85% chance of missed issue. Least confident flags: ruj.6 (index-loop style vs. correctness hazard — borderline opinion), ruj.11 (labeled opinion: doc comment style with no functional difference). Uncertainty driven by: not having read the source directly to verify whether the efficiency claims (ruj.1, ruj.2, ruj.5, ruj.8, ruj.10, ruj.13) are all distinct rather than overlapping, and whether ruj.4 (#[non_exhaustive]) is warranted given the crate's stated stability posture. Running out of real complaints: no.
